question: Show the latest daily reliability and on-time trend
statement: SELECT flight_date, total_flights, on_time_rate, p90_arr_delay_minutes, severe_delay_rate, reliability_score FROM analytics.mart_kpi_daily_operations ORDER BY flight_date DESC LIMIT 1
